a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none no-repeat scroll 100% 4px / 13.2px padding-box border-box

a.internal-link.is-unresolved[data-href=.background: rgba(55, 53, 47, 0.45) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
a.internal-link.is-unresolved[data-href=.font-family: "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, hsl(203, 8%, 100%) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(hsl(203, 8%, 100%), color-mix(in srgb, hsl(203, 8%, 100%) 65%, transparent))
